name: Chicken Lasagne
recipeInstructions:
-------------------SIMMERED CHICKEN-------------------
1. Begin with 1 Chicken, broiler-fryer.
2. Combine water, onion, celery tops, bay leaf, salt, and pepper in a kettle.
3. Bring to a boil; cover tightly.
4. Reduce heat and simmer for 1 hour, or until chicken is tender.
5. Remove from heat; let cool.
6. Strain broth; refrigerate chicken and broth immediately.
7. Shred the cooled chicken and remove meat from bones.
1. In a large saucepan, melt butter; stir in flour, salt, and basil.
2. Gradually add simmered chicken broth, stirring constantly until thickened and boiling.
3. Remove from heat; stir in shredded chicken.
4. Mix beaten egg into cottage cheese.
5. Grease a 13x9x2-inch baking dish with oil.
6. Layer half the noodles, half the cottage cheese mixture, half the spinach, and half the mozzarella in the bottom of the dish.
7. Repeat layers; finish with remaining ingredients.
8. Sprinkle Parmesan cheese on top.
9. Bake at 375°F for 45 minutes.
10. Remove from oven; let stand 10 minutes before cutting into squares.
